name: Kale and Parsnips
recipeIngredient: 1 quart Kale, veins removed & cut into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the onions and parsnips in oil for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
2. Add the water and ginger.
3. Cover and simmer for 4 to 5 minutes.
4. Add the kale and continue cooking for another 4 to 5 minutes, stirring occasionally but keeping the saucepan covered.
5. Serve hot.
